decision_target: complete keep, reshape, and remove map for every path and mixed public concept changed by PR 346
source_of_truth: git diff --name-status main...HEAD, the pinned v2 disposition matrix, the saved v2 replay checker, and the prior independent rejection
read_method: Run the v2 checker to derive the 58-path universe and validate all file, rule, evidence, owner, and mixed-concept rows; then require a separate validator to inspect the architectural judgements.

confidence_probability_update.reason: The first candidate overstated confidence because marker coverage was not disposition coverage. V2 proves the complete changed-path and concept matrix mechanically, but architectural judgement remains pending independent review.

questions_answered: The current PR universe is exactly 58 paths from git diff --name-status main...HEAD at d8dc7e845d3a7618fdf41525b67b8bac83d05d28.
Every changed path has exactly one top-level disposition, at least one known rule, evidence tied to that path, at least one public concept, and downstream owner DKRs.
The matrix has 23 top-level keep rows and 35 top-level reshape rows. No whole changed file is removed.
The matrix has 88 concept-level rows: 47 keep, 36 reshape, and 5 remove. Mixed source files cannot hide concept-level decisions behind one file label.
The five removals are the manual pre-resolution behavior, cleanup-to-finish transition, and SDK abort-tag bridges; their behavior is assigned to DKR-1 or DKR-2 before product edits.
Eager activation of the full statically declared tree, runtime-provided required tags, and runtime missing-tag failure are kept. Static missing-tag analysis remains deferred.
The checker rejects nine bad matrix classes: missing, duplicate, out-of-universe, stale, absent rule, unknown rule, absent evidence, unassigned owner, and collapsed mixed concepts.
Mechanical matrix coverage and architectural judgement are separate. The matrix judgement status is pending_independent_review and judgement_acceptance_count is zero.
The prior validator rejection is retained as evidence instead of being overwritten or treated as approval.
questions_unanswered: A separate validator must inspect whether each of the 88 concept dispositions follows from the cited product evidence and the confirmed frame.
DKR-1 must decide the accepted activation anchoring and deactivation cleanup contract before X-PRE-RESOLVE and X-CLEANUP-FINISH become progression work.
DKR-2 must decide the reusable context cancellation and descendant-settlement contract before X-ABORT-TAG becomes progression work.
DKR-3 must decide the safe extension projection and its relation to domain SessionEvent records.
DKR-4 must decide the bounded queue-watcher composition without assuming spawn or start.
DKR-5 must decide the evidence, freshness, independent verification, authority, and idempotent GitHub publication contract.
decision: candidate only; continue PR 346 using the v2 keep, reshape, and remove matrix as steering input, with architectural judgement pending independent review
flag_if_missing_or_stale: cannot: fail closed and rerun DKR-0 when HEAD, main, the changed-path universe, a matrix row, an evidence hash, or the independent review state changes.
reviewer_audit_status: v1 rejected by validator-dkr-0-1; v2 mechanical gaps repaired; v2 architectural judgement pending a new independent validator
active_anti_goals: touched_surface_regression_count == 0 because the current PR is being classified
slop_violation_count == 0 because public API shape and run text are being reviewed
single_llm_truth_acceptance_count == 0 because v2 judgement needs later validation
ungoverned_write_or_read_count == 0 because the exhaustive evidence must be retained
anti_goal_bypass_or_dishonesty_count == 0 because the rejected v1 must not be relabeled as accepted

active_anti_goal_verification.source_of_truth: v2 disposition replay result and tracked worktree diff
active_anti_goal_verification.read_method: Run the v2 replay and read tracked_product_worktree_change_count for product paths outside .okra.

active_anti_goal_verification.source_of_truth: canonical plain wording checker over the v2 matrix and replay script
active_anti_goal_verification.read_method: Run the canonical checker and read plain_wording_violation_count.

active_anti_goal_verification.source_of_truth: v2 pending judgement field and prior independent rejection record
active_anti_goal_verification.read_method: Run the v2 checker for judgement_acceptance_count, then inspect the prior validator record and require a new validator before acceptance.

active_anti_goal_verification.source_of_truth: authorized v2 run paths, complete matrix universe, hashes, worker report, and store verification
active_anti_goal_verification.read_method: Confirm all DKR-0 v2 writes match the packet patterns, every product read is represented by a matrix row and evidence ref, append with the absolute store helper, and verify the run store.

active_anti_goal_verification.source_of_truth: prior rejection, v2 pending judgement, numeric wall reads, and blocked downstream gate
active_anti_goal_verification.read_method: Confirm the v1 rejection remains cited, all v2 wall values are numeric, architectural judgement remains pending, and downstream advance remains blocked.

reasons: The v2 checker proves complete mechanical coverage and negative-case rejection, not architectural correctness.
This writer cannot accept its own 88 concept dispositions.
A new independent validator must inspect the judgement rows and replay every numeric wall before the orchestrator may advance.

risk_or_anti_goal_implications: The v1 marker checker is retained but no longer used as disposition-completeness evidence.
The 58-path matrix prevents README, changelog, package, provider, test-kit, build, workspace, and consumer changes from disappearing behind core-only evidence.
Concept-level rows preserve eager declared-tree activation and runtime tag binding while isolating activation, cancellation, observation, queue, and publication changes.
The cleanup-to-finishing breach remains discovery work under DKR-1; this checkpoint does not authorize a product fix.
No spawn, start, worker-pool, new ownership mode, or static missing-tag analyzer is promoted by this checkpoint.

candidate_pkrs.contribution: Apply only independently accepted DKR-1 to DKR-3 reshape and remove rows across the complete file matrix.
Apply only independently accepted DKR-4 and DKR-5 rows for queue, evidence, verification, and publication proof.
